name: Saucy Pork Fajitas
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb Boneless pork loin, cut into 1/4-inch strips
2 large Green bell peppers, cut into thin strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Toss the pork with salt and pepper. Heat 2 tablespoons oil in a large skillet over high heat. Add half of the pork; cook, stirring, until brown, about 1 to 2 minutes. Remove with a slotted spoon; repeat with 2 more tablespoons oil and remaining pork. Remove from the skillet. Reduce heat to medium.
2. Add the remaining 2 tablespoons oil to the skillet; cook the peppers and onions until tender, 10 to 12 minutes.
3. Return the pork to the skillet. Stir in the salsa and preserves; heat through. Remove from heat; stir in green onions and cilantro.
4. Place tortillas between dampened paper towels; microwave on High 30 to 50 seconds or until warm and just steaming. Fill each tortilla with a scant 1/2 cup pork mixture. Serve each with a dollop of sour cream.
